ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school" TEXT /* School the student attends */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the student (M or F) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "famsize" TEXT /* Family size (GT3 or LE3) */,
  "Pstatus" TEXT /* Parent's cohabitation status (T or A) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Student's ethnicity */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Student's disability status (yes or no) */,
  "english_proficiency" TEXT /* Student's English proficiency (yes or no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student this performance record belongs to */,
  "G1" INTEGER /* Grade for the first period */,
  "G2" INTEGER /* Grade for the second period */,
  "G3" INTEGER /* Final grade */,
  "subject_1" TEXT /* Student's grade in subject 1 */,
  "subject_2" TEXT /* Student's grade in subject 2 */,
  "subject_3" TEXT /* Student's grade in subject 3 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student this record belongs to */,
  "traveltime" INTEGER /* Travel time to school in minutes */,
  "studytime" INTEGER /* Weekly study time in hours */,
  "failures" INTEGER /* Number of past class failures */,
  "parental_support" INTEGER /* Level of parental support (scale 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_background" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family background record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student this record belongs to */,
  "Medu" INTEGER /* Mother's education level (0 to 4) */,
  "Fedu" INTEGER /* Father's education level (0 to 4) */,
  "Mjob" TEXT /* Mother's job type */,
  "Fjob" TEXT /* Father's job type */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for choosing this school */,
  "guardian" TEXT /* Guardian of the student */,
  "family_income" INTEGER /* Family income per month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_background_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extracurriculars" (
  "extracurricular_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extracurricular record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student this record belongs to */,
  "activities" TEXT /* Participation in extracurricular activities (yes or no) */,
  "nursery" TEXT /* Attendance at nursery (yes or no) */,
  "higher" TEXT /* Indicates if the student aspires to pursue higher education (yes or no) */,
  "club_participation" TEXT /* Specific clubs or organizations the student participates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extracurricular_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extracurriculars_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_access" (
  "internet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internet access record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student this record belongs to */,
  "internet" TEXT /* Internet access (yes or no) */,
  "romantic" TEXT /* Romantic relationship status (yes or no) */,
  "devices_owned" TEXT /* List of devices owned by the student (e.g., laptop, tablet, smartphone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("internet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internet_access_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_life" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social life record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student this record belongs to */,
  "famrel" INTEGER /* Quality of family relationships (scale 1 to 5) */,
  "freetime" INTEGER /* Free time after school (scale 1 to 5) */,
  "goout" INTEGER /* Going out with friends frequency (scale 1 to 5) */,
  "social_media_usage" TEXT /* Social media platforms used by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_life_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substance_use" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance use record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student this record belongs to */,
  "Dalc" INTEGER /* Workday alcohol consumption (scale 1 to 5) */,
  "Walc" INTEGER /* Weekend alcohol consumption (scale 1 to 5) */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Current health status (scale 1 to 5) */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status (yes or no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_use_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absence_records" (
  "absence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absence record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student this record belongs to */,
  "absences" INTEGER /* Number of absences */,
  "reason_for_absence" TEXT /* Reason for absence (e.g., illness, family emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("absence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absence_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the account (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, teacher, counselor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counseling_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each counseling record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student this record belongs to */,
  "counselor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counselor who conducted the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the counseling session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the counseling session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counseling_records_counselor_id FOREIGN KEY ("counselor_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counseling_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_support_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support service record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student this record belongs to */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of support service used (e.g., academic, mental health) */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date when the support service was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_support_services_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
